# Cosmic Cartographers of Faith
## Scripture
"For since the creation of the world God’s invisible qualities—his eternal power and divine nature—have been clearly seen, being understood from what has been made, so that people are without excuse." - Romans 1:20

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we are reminded of the intricate web of relationships between celestial bodies. Astronomers have long been mapping the movements of stars, planets, and galaxies, creating complex charts to understand the vast expanse of our universe. In a similar way, our faith journey can be seen as a process of mapping the contours of God's character. As we navigate the twists and turns of life, we come to understand the eternal power and divine nature of our Creator. The cosmos serves as a grand testament to God's invisible qualities, inviting us to explore, discover, and worship.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Cartographer, as we explore the vastness of your creation, help us to chart the depths of your love and wisdom. May the stars, planets, and galaxies guide us toward a deeper understanding of your eternal power and divine nature. As we navigate the journey of faith, may our hearts be filled with wonder, awe, and reverence for the beauty and complexity of your creation. Amen.
